top.title: Gas and oil prices soar and shares tumble on fears conflict could escalate
top.summary: Markets react as the conflict in the Middle East intensifies and concerns grow over how long it will last.

top.title: Trump threatens to halt trade with Spain over military base access
top.summary: Trump lashed out after Spain barred the US from using its military bases to carry out strikes on Iran.

top.title: European allies rush to bolster Cyprus defences after drones target British base
top.summary: The Cypriot government suspects the Iran-backed group Hezbollah in Lebanon targeted the UK's RAF Akrotiri base in Cyprus.

top.title: TikTok won't protect DMs with controversial privacy tech, saying it would put users at risk
top.summary: TikTok tells the BBC it won't join rival platforms such as WhatsApp and Messenger in using end-to-end encryption.

top.title: OpenAI changes deal with US military after backlash
top.summary: Chief Executive Sam Altman said the group would prohibit the use of its systems to spy on Americans.

top.title: Amazon says drones damaged three facilities in UAE and Bahrain
top.summary: The incidents highlight the vulnerability of key technology infrastructure during military conflicts.
